Josh Hudson
Work About Blog

Hi, I'm Josh. I focus on impactful digital experiences. I'm a Web Developer who thrives on collaboration, transforming ideas into robust web solutions. From the sunny South Coast, I craft custom websites and bring innovative projects to life, fueled by a passion for code and creativity.

Featured projects

Here are some of my latest projects showcasing various skills and technologies.

Natural Paving Stores

Featured

Natural Paving Stores is a leading supplier of high-quality paving materials and landscaping products. An e-commerce website was developed to showcase their extensive product range, provide detailed product information, and facilitate online ordering for customers.

Cheer! at work

Featured

Cheer! at Work is a platform designed to boost workplace morale and engagement through fun and interactive activities. Features include team challenges, recognition tools, and resources to create a positive work environment.

Vodafone – Design is the Difference

Featured

Collaborated with Tilt to deliver an interactive web experience for Vodafone, highlighting the impact of design in business. The project features engaging animations and storytelling elements.
